title: Elastic (ESTC) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Summary
text: Elastic (ESTC) Q4 FY2024 Results. Key Financial Metrics: Total revenue $335 million, up 20% YoY. Subscription revenue $311 million, up 21% YoY. Elastic Cloud revenue $148 million, up 32% YoY (44% of total revenue). Operating margin 8.6%. Diluted EPS $0.21. Free cash flow margin 18% (~$60 million). Customer Metrics: Over 1,330 customers with annual contract values exceeding $100,000. Over 165 customers with ACV above $1 million. Over 4,370 customers above $100,000 ACV. Net expansion rate approximately 110%. Over 1,000 paying customers using vector database and RAG capabilities. Management Guidance: FY2025 Outlook: Full-year revenue guidance $1.468-$1.480 billion (16% YoY growth at midpoint). Non-GAAP operating margin 11.7%-12.3%. Non-GAAP diluted EPS $1.35-$1.47. Q1 FY2025: Revenue guidance $343-$345 million (17% YoY growth). Non-GAAP operating margin 9.2%-9.4%. Non-GAAP diluted EPS $0.24-$0.26. GenAI Adoption: Management emphasized rapid GenAI adoption among largest customers, with 145 customers with annual contract values over $100,000 already using GenAI capabilities. Company not modeling significant revenue contribution from GenAI in 2025, indicating early-stage adoption with longer implementation timelines. Product Innovations: Launched Search AI Lake with exabyte-scale architecture. Announced technical preview of Elastic Cloud Serverless. Enhanced Elasticsearch open inference API with Cohere and OpenAI integrations. Released Attack discovery for security, powered by search AI. Market Environment: Consumption patterns remained steady throughout Q4. SMB segment continued experiencing macroeconomic pressure, while enterprise and commercial segments showed strong momentum through platform consolidation deals and competitive displacement.
